title: haynaldia exaltata
intro: Haynaldia exaltata, also known as Japanese angelica or Kanzo, is a type of perennial plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Haynaldia exaltata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Haynaldia exaltata often involve the use of its roots, which can be dried and made into teas, infusions, or tonics.
